description.ko: 백색광이 유리 프리즘에 진입하여 굴절의 힘을 통해 찬란한 스펙트럼 색상으로 분산되는 찰나를 포착한 정교한 빛의 물리적 시각화입니다.
description.en: An intricate capture of light physics, showcasing the moment white light enters a glass prism and disperses into a brilliant array of spectral colors through the power of refraction.

prompt: Macro photography of a crystal prism splitting a sharp beam of white light into a vivid rainbow spectrum, sharp focus on the internal refraction and dispersion, soft bokeh background with iridescent light leaks, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting.
